title: architecture_oversight findings-log.jsonl not initialized
description: The advisor's findings-log.jsonl file does not exist. This is required for recording architecture scan results and tracking the history of structural decisions.
recommendation: Initialize findings-log.jsonl as an empty JSONL file

title: All 5 advisors remain in stub status without production activation
description: All advisors (architecture_oversight, framework_development, sage, documentation, deployment_automation) are registered but remain in 'stub' status with no activation date recorded. This is architectural drift from the advisor lifecycle design.
recommendation: Document the advisor activation decision path and update registry.json status field to track production vs. development advisors

title: architecture_oversight has no feeds.yaml configuration
description: The architecture_oversight advisor lacks a feeds.yaml file to define scan inputs and sources. This prevents structured scanning of specific metrics or targets.
recommendation: Define feeds.yaml to specify what data sources the advisor should monitor (schema registry, protocol logs, etc.)

title: schedule-index.json has inconsistent advisor lifecycle tracking
description: The schedule-index.json shows some advisors with last_run_at and next_recommended_run dates (framework_development, documentation, deployment_automation) while architecture_oversight has both as null. This is acceptable for a never-run advisor but should be documented.
recommendation: Add documentation to schedule-index.json schema explaining null handling for uninitialized advisors
